texto: What will life be like without her? I am dreadfully sad she is leaving. What if she just disappears
autor: gets tired of all this trouble at home? What if she leaves me too? How heavy is a dresser when you're the only one pushing it against the door? I feel truly on my own.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a gets tired of all this trouble at home? What if she leaves me too? How heavy is a dresser when you're the only one pushing it against the door? I feel truly on my own.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “What will life be like without her? I am dreadfully sad she is leaving. What if she just disappears” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mira-bartok, the-memory-palace pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-memory-palace.
